ddls:
CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the data layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data layer */,
  "physical_unit" TEXT /* Physical unit or class of the data */,
  "physical_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the physical data */,
  "physical_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the physical data */,
  "waveband" TEXT /* Waveband for reflectance data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data layer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the layer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the layer */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_bodies" (
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water body */,
  "water_body_name" TEXT /* Name of the water body */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the water body */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the water body */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the water body in square kilometers */,
  "depth_m" REAL /* Average depth of the water body in meters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of water body (e.g., lake, river, ocean) */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Date of the last survey */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the water body entry */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "water_body_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water body where the observation was made */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data layer of the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observation_value" REAL /* Value of the observation */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the observation */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the observation */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the observation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observation */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the observation point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the observation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the observation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the observation */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_water_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_body_id") REFERENCES water_bodies ("water_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbidity_data" (
  "turbidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbidity data entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID */,
  "mean_turbidity" REAL /* Mean turbidity value */,
  "std_dev_turbidity" REAL /* Standard deviation of turbidity */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring turbidity */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for measuring turbidity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement point */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the measurement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data entry */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbidity_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trophic_state_index" (
  "tsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trophic state index data entry */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation ID */,
  "tsi_value" REAL /* Trophic state index value */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for calculating the TSI */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the measurement */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement point */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the measurement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data entry */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trophic_state_index_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregation_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregation period */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the aggregation period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the aggregation period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Description of the aggregation period */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the period (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)
